name: PATH A formula (production ranker)
what_it_solves: Signed decision locking the production ranker formula for CrisPRO to PATH A.
how_it_solves: Approval statement (Fahad Kiani, 2026-04-28): 'Approved PATH A as production ranker formula effective immediately.' Formula: fit = clip((p·t) / ‖t‖₂, 0, 1). Records committed under governance/formula_decision/ in fjkiani/Brenus + fjkiani/crispro-backend-v2.
why_it_exists: Prior sessions oscillated between PATH A and PATH B, quarantining downstream items (DL-03, PC-05, CT-01, Change 1.2). Signing PATH A unblocked ranker recomputation and made PATH B prohibited in all outputs.
